text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the hall on the way to my
office when...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Forty minutes and thirty seconds have passed.
Let's take a break, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's gotten so late already... Sorry, but I can't
solve this problem.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I took into consideration your
attention span and tendency to fixate on difficult
problems when creating the timetable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You needn't feel rushed. We'll be able to cover
all the test material without issue at our current
pace.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Flash... I really appreciate this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Think nothing of it. I take enjoyment in
teaching you since you grasp new material so
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Two minutes, thirty-four seconds have elapsed.
Prepare to resume. I'm certain you can figure out
the problem after one more attempt.
I wonder about that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. I just happened to overhear your
conversation while doing some research.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Tachyon! What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm just wondering if Scarlet might be slipping
back into her bad habits is all. Just the other
day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the wait, Scarlet. This treatment
agent is the byproduct we'll be researching
toda—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Dried rheum around the orbicularis oculi, and
edema of the upper arm and zygomaticus major
muscle...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems what you truly require before your test is
a sofa in a dim environment in which you can
acquire restful sleep.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tachyon! I asked you to keep that between us!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me you have been studying
outside our sessions and even going so far as to
forgo sleep?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urk! I'm sorry... I just really want to get the
number one score again, so...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, it is I who should apologize. It's my fault for
acting as your tutor while failing to comprehend
your needs and wants.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To remedy this, I must ask Tachyon to enlighten
me about this side of you I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will use the information I gain to create a more
efficient schedule that better fits your needs!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Don't go digging for more
embarrassing stories about me! I'm embarrassed
enough already!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: H-hey! You're Flash's trainer, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you stop her now, um... Flash won't have to work as
hard and can focus on training better!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Please don't try to stop me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A better understanding of your tutee leads to
increased efficiency. As an instructor, surely you
understand.
choice_data_list: There's a faster way to solve this, you know.
There's a faster way to solve this, you know.

Stick at it and learn everything you can about
her!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A better understanding of your tutee leads to
increased efficiency. As an instructor, surely you
understand.
choice_data_list: There's a faster way to solve this, you know.
There's a faster way to solve this, you know.

Stick at it and learn everything you can about
her!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And that would be?
choice_data_list:
Team up with Tachyon and tutor Scarlet
together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's a fine solution. Tachyon can make up
for anything I don't know about Scarlet, and we
can cover double the amount of material at once.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'd feel doubly ready with two teachers
helping me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I shall draft a new schedule right away.
One minute and fifteen seconds should suffice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While I don't mind contributing, I have an
experiment planned after this, Flash.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If I had assurance that I could conduct an
equivalent experiment to make up for the one I
won't get to perform today, I'd be more inclined
to help.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, how about I help you with the task
you mentioned yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you offering to participate in my study
on the differences between one's biological clock
and real time? Very well, then!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I've adjusted my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For five minutes, I will explain how to solve a
practice question pertaining to the material.
Then, Tachyon will give you problems that use
the same rules.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: All right! Sounds good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Eishin Flash is having a really good
time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, I'd greatly appreciate it if you could
share your knowledge on Scarlet's bad habits
right away.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Wouldn't that be a waste of time?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's not a problem. It won't take me longer than an
hour and ten minutes to gather information on
you and organize it all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The improved efficiency will compensate for the
lost time, so we technically won't be going past
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
While I don't mind contributing, I have an
experiment planned after this, Flash.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If I had assurance that I could conduct an
equivalent experiment to make up for the one I
won't get to perform today, I'd be more inclined
to help.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, how about I help you with the task
you mentioned yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you offering to participate in my study
on the differences between one's biological clock
and real time? Very well, then!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin at once. It would behoove us to tackle
these questions as quickly as possible!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was not sure how things would turn out, but I'm
relieved to know I can count on your support.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: W-well, I'm not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Eishin Flash is having a really good
time!
